heading: Rancho California Water District project, California
label: 390h–32 Rancho California Water District project, California

children.heading: Authorization
children.label: a Authorization
children.text: The Secretary, in cooperation with the Rancho California Water District, California, may participate in the design, planning, and construction of permanent facilities for water recycling, demineralization, and desalination, and distribution of non-potable water supplies in Southern Riverside County, California.

children.heading: Cost sharing
children.label: b Cost sharing
children.text: The Federal share of the cost of the project described in subsection (a) shall not exceed 25 percent of the total cost of the project or $20,000,000, whichever is less.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: c Limitation
children.text: Funds provided by the Secretary under this section shall not be used for operation or maintenance of the project described in subsection (a).
